top_signals.title: Local assembly chambers in Japan open their doors for studying and weddings
top_signals.summary: As the chambers are only sparingly used when assemblies are not in session, it is hoped allowing residents to make use of the spaces will raise public awareness of the assemblies.

top_signals.title: Headline's Zhu on Asia Tech Opportunities
top_signals.summary: Clarey Zhu, Partner at Headline Growth, discusses the investment opportunities in Asia's tech sector, including AI infrastructure, deep tech and robotics. She speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts from the sidelines of the IVS2026 conference in Kyoto. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Hong Kong-listed shares of Chinese electric vehicle makers surged, after companies posted June vehicle data that helped to buoy investor sentiment.

top_signals.title: New E-commerce duty for small packages set to increase fairness for EU businesses and safety for consumers
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 01 Jul 2026 Starting today, the EU abolishes an outdated customs duty exemption for e-commerce packages worth less than €150.

top_signals.title: Questions and answers on €3 customs duty
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Questions and answers Brussels, 01 Jul 2026 How is the €3 temporary customs duty applied in practice?
The €3 duty is applied per item to consignments with a value up to €150. The measure applies to goods ...

top_signals.title: Wall Street Is Pivoting From Solar To Solar Plus Storage
top_signals.summary: The global solar energy boom is showing no signs of slowing down, with falling costs and ambitious clean energy targets continuing to drive rapid adoption. Last year, solar capacity additions surged 11% Y/Y to a record 647 GW worldwide, bringing the total cumulative solar capacity across the globe to 2.9 TW and cementing its position as the world's fastest-growing electricity source. Indeed, in April 2026, monthly global electricity generation from solar and wind surpassed gas-fired generation for the first time ever, a major milestone considering…
